name: agentils-vscode
description: VS Code task console scaffold for AgentILS conversation/task workflows

chatParticipants.name: agentils
chatParticipants.description: Start the AgentILS task console directly from chat.

languageModelTools.name: agentils_start_conversation
languageModelTools.modelDescription: MANDATORY first tool for AgentILS custom prompts such as /agentils.run-code, /agentils.run-task, and #startnewtask when the request is concrete. Do not answer with plain text before calling this tool inside an AgentILS flow.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Start a new AgentILS task conversation.
languageModelTools.description: Start a new AgentILS task conversation and return the latest runtime snapshot.

languageModelTools.name: agentils_continue_task
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use after an AgentILS task has started to advance the active task and record progress notes.
languageModelTools.description: Advance the active AgentILS task with an optional continuation note.

languageModelTools.name: agentils_request_clarification
languageModelTools.modelDescription: MANDATORY first tool when an AgentILS custom prompt is missing blocking detail. Use this instead of asking a plain-text follow-up.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Ask the user for missing detail through AgentILS.
languageModelTools.description: Request blocking clarification from the user through the AgentILS interaction panel.

languageModelTools.name: agentils_request_feedback
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use at AgentILS decision points to collect continue/done/revise feedback through the AgentILS interaction panel.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Ask the user for feedback through AgentILS.
languageModelTools.description: Request user feedback for the current AgentILS task state and persist the response.

languageModelTools.name: agentils_request_approval
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use before risky AgentILS actions to collect explicit approval through the AgentILS interaction panel. Do not proceed without approval.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Ask the user to approve a risky AgentILS action.
languageModelTools.description: Request approval for a risky AgentILS action and persist the approval decision.

languageModelTools.name: agentils_finish_conversation
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this to finish the AgentILS conversation after the active tasks and gates are complete.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Attempt to finish the current AgentILS conversation.
languageModelTools.description: Ask the AgentILS runtime to finish the current conversation if gates are satisfied.

agentils.runtime.httpBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL for a running AgentILS HTTP debug server. Leave empty to use the local built MCP server.

agentils.runtime.serverModulePath.description: Optional absolute path to the built AgentILS MCP server entrypoint. Defaults to the extension's sibling repo build output when available, otherwise <workspace>/packages/mcp/dist/index.js.

agentils.runtime.controlPlaneModulePath.description: Deprecated legacy setting for the old local control-plane path. Prefer agentils.runtime.serverModulePath.

agentils.runtime.stateFilePath.description: Optional absolute path to the AgentILS state file. Defaults to <workspace>/.data/agentils-state.json.

agentils.taskConsole.showStatusBar.description: Show the AgentILS status bar item.
